init.description: Specify which features to draw on the map.

data_description.charger: Show the charger on the map.
data_description.cleaned_area: Show the area cleaned on the map.
data_description.goto_path: Show the go-to path on the map.
data_description.ignored_obstacles: Show ignored obstacles on the map.
data_description.ignored_obstacles_with_photo: Show ignored obstacles with photos on the map.
data_description.mop_path: Show the mop path on the map.
data_description.no_carpet_zones: Show the no carpet zones on the map.
data_description.no_go_zones: Show the no-go zones on the map.
data_description.no_mopping_zones: Show the no-mop zones on the map.
data_description.obstacles_with_photo: Show obstacles with photos on the map.
data_description.path: Show the path on the map.
data_description.predicted_path: Show the predicted path on the map.
data_description.vacuum_position: Show the vacuum position on the map.
data_description.virtual_walls: Show virtual walls on the map.
data_description.show_background: Show the map background (the area outside the cleaned region). Disable for a transparent background image.
data_description.show_walls: Show walls on the map. Disable for a transparent overlay.
data_description.show_rooms: Show room colouring on the map. Disable for a transparent overlay.
data_description.show_floor: Show the general scanned floor area (MAP_INSIDE/MAP_SCAN pixels). Disable to hide removed/hidden zones that appear as light green.
